name: Wadsworth
description: Wadsworth is an AI-powered organic marketing platform that monitors and improves whether businesses and creators are recommended by AI assistants like ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity. It handles content creation, answer-engine optimization, and visibility tracking so clients get found and cited by AI without paid ads.
slogan: Done-for-you execution plus a free instant AI visibility check lowers the barrier to entry while demonstrating value immediately — no competitor offers this combo.
